name: @vault-graph/atlas-ui
description: Cartographer / Atlas UI — Sigma.js graph explorer. Browser source built into workers/vault-mcp/public/dist by bun build + scripts/sync-artifacts.ts.

scripts.build: bun build src/frontend/app.ts src/frontend/fa3-worker.ts --outdir ../../workers/vault-mcp/public/dist --target browser --minify && bun run scripts/sync-artifacts.ts
